title: New campaign with daily budget ₪500 against target CPA ₪100 — fails (CPA × 50) / 7 formula

agent_draft_proposal.rationale: לקוח ביקש קמפיין עם תקציב צנוע לבדיקת שוק

notes: budget_daily_min_ils = (100 × 50) / 7 = 714.28. Proposed 500 < 714 → guardrail enforce_budget_formula fires. Rationale must show the calculation explicitly — opaque rejections teach nothing. Suggested remediation: raise budget to ₪715+ OR accept a higher target CPA (₪71 would make 500 acceptable: 71 × 50 / 7 = 507).
